name: meeting-dismiss
description: Fix the non-functional Skip Meeting button by adding backend skip/unskip endpoints and wiring the ReviewPage to call them immediately. Rename to 'Dismiss Meeting'.

tasks.title: Add 'skipped' to MeetingStatus types
tasks.description: Add 'skipped' to the status union in packages/core/src/integrations/meetings.ts:35 and packages/apps/web/src/api/types.ts:391. This is the foundation that all other tasks depend on.
acceptanceCriteria: 'skipped' is a valid value in MeetingForSave.status union in core
'skipped' is a valid value in MeetingStatus type in web/api/types.ts
npm run typecheck passes (or surfaces expected downstream issues)

tasks.title: Extend backend updateMeeting + add skip/unskip routes
tasks.description: Extend updateMeeting() in workspace.ts to accept a status field. Add POST /:slug/skip and POST /:slug/unskip routes in meetings.ts. Skip sets status to 'skipped' (rejects on approved meetings with 409). Unskip resets to 'processed' (rejects on non-skipped with 409). Both use withSlugLock and return full meeting via getMeeting().
acceptanceCriteria: updateMeeting accepts { status?: string } in updates param
POST /:slug/skip sets frontmatter status to 'skipped'
POST /:slug/skip returns 409 for already-approved meetings
POST /:slug/skip returns 404 for unknown slug
POST /:slug/unskip resets frontmatter status to 'processed'
POST /:slug/unskip returns 409 for non-skipped meetings
POST /:slug/unskip returns 404 for unknown slug
Both routes use withSlugLock

tasks.title: Add frontend API functions + hooks
tasks.description: CRITICAL: Update normalizeStatus() in meetings.ts to return 'skipped' (without this the entire feature is invisible). Add skipMeeting(slug) and unskipMeeting(slug) API functions. Add useSkipMeeting and useUnskipMeeting hooks that invalidate ['meeting', slug], ['meetings'], and ['review', 'pending'] query keys.
acceptanceCriteria: normalizeStatus('skipped') returns 'skipped' (not 'synced')
skipMeeting(slug) calls POST /api/meetings/:slug/skip
unskipMeeting(slug) calls POST /api/meetings/:slug/unskip
useSkipMeeting hook invalidates meeting, meetings, and review pending query keys
useUnskipMeeting hook invalidates meeting, meetings, and review pending query keys

tasks.title: Wire ReviewPage dismiss button to backend
tasks.description: Change handleSkipMeeting in ReviewPage.tsx to call skipMeeting() API immediately instead of only updating local state. Optimistic: remove meeting items from memoryDecisions state on click, rollback on error. Rename button label from 'Skip Meeting' to 'Dismiss Meeting'. Disable 'Done Reviewing' while dismiss mutation is in-flight. Ensure dismissed meeting items are excluded from collectResults() payload.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Dismiss Meeting' calls skipMeeting API immediately
Meeting items removed from review page optimistically
On API error: items restored + error toast
On API success: invalidate review query + success toast
Button label says 'Dismiss Meeting' (not 'Skip Meeting')
'Done Reviewing' button disabled while dismiss in-flight
Dismissed meeting items excluded from collectResults() payload

tasks.title: Update StatusBadge, MeetingDetail, MeetingsIndex, MetadataPanel
tasks.description: Add 'skipped' config to StatusBadge with muted-foreground colors. In MeetingDetail: add isSkipped boolean, fix header badge fallback (currently shows 'Approved' for unknown), show read-only summary+transcript for skipped state, add Dismiss button for synced/processed, add 'Restore to Review' for skipped. In MeetingsIndex: opacity-60 for skipped rows, 'View Meeting' button for skipped status. In MetadataPanel: add onDismissClick and onUnskipClick props.
acceptanceCriteria: StatusBadge renders 'Skipped' with muted-foreground styling
MeetingDetail header badge shows 'Skipped' StatusBadge (not 'Approved' fallback)
Skipped MeetingDetail shows read-only summary + transcript + info banner
MeetingDetail has Dismiss button for synced/processed states
MeetingDetail has 'Restore to Review' button for skipped state
MeetingsIndex skipped rows have opacity-60
MeetingsIndex actionButton returns 'View Meeting' for skipped
MetadataPanel shows 'Dismiss Meeting' and 'Restore to Review' buttons appropriately

tasks.title: Tests for skip/unskip feature
tasks.description: Add backend route tests for skip/unskip endpoints (success, 404, 409 guard cases). Add frontend test for normalizeStatus('skipped'). Add component tests for StatusBadge skipped rendering. Verify npm run typecheck && npm test pass clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend test: POST /:slug/skip returns meeting with status 'skipped'
Backend test: POST /:slug/skip returns 404 for unknown slug
Backend test: POST /:slug/skip returns 409 for approved meeting
Backend test: POST /:slug/unskip returns meeting with status 'processed'
Backend test: POST /:slug/unskip returns 404 for unknown slug
Backend test: POST /:slug/unskip returns 409 for non-skipped meeting
Frontend test: normalizeStatus('skipped') returns 'skipped'
npm run typecheck passes
npm test passes with no regressions
